chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ مِنِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 176 – What is Permissible for the man, from his woman, and she is menstruating

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/382)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/382)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ مِنِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ قَالَ مَا دُونَ الْفَرْجِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, drom Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Dawood Al Raqqy, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What is Permissible for the man, from his woman, and she is menstruating?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Whatever is besides the front private part’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Salmah ibn al-Khattab from Ali ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah from Dawud al-Riqqiy from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what is permissible for a man to enjoy with his wife during her experiencing Hayd (menses). He (the Imam) said, ‘Everything except her vulva.’”
